title: isatis tinctoria var. hirsuta
intro: Isatis tinctoria var. hirsuta, also known as hairy woad or woolly woad, is a variety of the Isatis tinctoria plant, a flowering plant in the mustard family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities, which contribute to its health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues and skin conditions. Isatis tinctoria var. hirsuta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments. Additionally, its extracts have been studied for their potential immunomodulatory and antitumor effects.
